name: Typetalk
description: Nulabs Japanese team chat — topic-based messaging with bots and REST API for issue/CI notifications.

seo.title: Typetalk — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Typetalk: Nulabs Japanese team chat — topic-based messaging with bots and REST API for issue/CI notifications.

when_to_use: Topic-based team chat API for Japanese enterprise
Bot integration for CI/CD build notifications
REST API for issue tracker to chat notifications
Webhook integration for ops alerts to team channels
Japanese team messaging with Nulab ecosystem integration

pros: REST API for CI, issue and bot integrations
Bundles well with Nulab Backlog and Cacoo
cons: Mostly compelling inside Japan and Nulab users
UI feels dated in several areas
review.verdict: Decent team chat if you already live in Nulab Backlog; otherwise Slack or Teams remain the default.
review.best_for: Japanese engineering teams on Backlog/Cacoo wanting integrated chat
review.not_for: Global teams or companies not already invested in Nulab tools
